content.text: Cost state looks healthy at 37.9%. Let me run the remaining checks.

arguments.command: bash scripts/main-session-context-watchdog.sh 2>&1; echo "---"; cat state/main-session-context-ok.json 2>/dev/null; cat state/main-session-context-reset.json 2>/dev/null
bash scripts/main-session-resume-check.sh 2>&1; echo "---"; cat state/main-session-resume-needs-ken.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no resume file"
bash scripts/task-watchdog.sh 2>&1; echo "---"; cat state/task-stall-alert.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no task stall"
bash scripts/cron-health-check.sh 2>&1; echo "---"; cat state/cron-health-alert.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no cron health alert"

cat state/cron-dead-letter-alert.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no dead letter"; echo "---"; cat state/dod-validation-alert.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no dod validation"; echo "---"; cat state/task-verification-alert.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no task verification"
bash scripts/owl-compliance-check.sh 2>&1; echo "---"; cat state/chg-triggers.json 2>/dev/null | head -80 || echo "no chg triggers"
bash scripts/aria-crest-check.sh 2>&1; echo "---"; cat state/aria-crest-alert.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no aria alert"
